# About Muhammed Sayees
> Muhammed Sayees (also known as Mohammed Sayees or simply Sayees) is an AI Engineer and CTO at Narrs.
> He specializes in building AI-powered products, machine learning systems, and modern web applications.
> Technologies: AI/LLMs, Python, Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Three.js, WebGL
> Location: Kerala, India
> Education: Yenepoya University

# Current Roles
- Co-Founder & CTO at Narrs (https://www.narrs.in)
- AI Engineer at Weam
- Full Stack Developer
- Machine Learning Engineer

# Projects
- Narrs Platform: AI-powered tools and products
- ML Systems: LLM-based systems and machine learning pipelines
- 3D Web Experiences: Interactive web applications using Three.js and WebGL
